summary: Comprehensive test suite with strong coverage of all core requirements. Unit tests (test_cleanup.py) exercise the three retention policies individually and in combination, dry-run mode, JSON loading with error cases, and summary calculation. Workflow tests (test_workflow.py) validate structure, triggers, dependencies, and actionlint compliance. E2E tests (run_act_tests.py) verify full pipeline through GitHub Actions with three fixture cases. Good test organization, deterministic fixtures (REF_NOW, _art helper), independent cases, and specific assertions. Gaps: boundary conditions (max_age at exact cutoff time, keep_latest_n=0, max_total_size_bytes=0), timezone format edge cases (Z vs +00:00) not explicitly tested despite code handling them, some policy-ordering precedence scenarios untested. E2E assertions rely on exact string matching which could be fragile. Would reliably catch regressions in core functionality; minor edge cases could slip through.
